source_domains: Database bootstrap, connection, server capability, and unavailable database boundaries
Query execution, result retrieval, public result state, and query logging
Charset, collation, safe-collation checks, and invalid text stripping
Table lists, prefixes, blog switching, and multisite table state
promoted_decisions: dbDelta field versus index line classification
wpdb::query affected-row versus selected-row return decision
wpdb::query failed insert/replace insert_id clearing decision
wpdb::_do_query native mysqli query call gate decision
wpdb::query native mysqli fetch-object call gate decision
wpdb::get_var null versus scalar return decision

selected_integration_path.decision: Use @:phpGlobal typed externs on the stock Haxe PHP target for mysqli_query()/mysqli_fetch_object(). Reflaxe/custom PHP target work is not required for this specific global-call lowering gap unless later ABI surfaces expose target shapes the stock PHP backend cannot express.

cases.focus: existing table short-circuit and missing table creation through a live SHOW TABLES and CREATE TABLE path
live DESC column discovery and ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN execution
live DESCRIBE/SHOW INDEX metadata consumed for a non-executed dbDelta schema plan
live ALTER/INSERT/UPDATE execution and resulting schema/data state
schema SQL generation with live wpdb charset/collation state
global table dbDelta filtering before live metadata/execution
real option.php cache/storage flow over a live wp_options table
batch option priming and autoload updates against live rows
non-expiring transient storage through the live options table
live multi-table expired transient cleanup SQL
server identity, SQL mode normalization, charset/collation, and information-schema metadata
live result scalar, object, keyed-object, associative-array, numeric-array, and duplicate OBJECT_K selection behavior
live empty query, not-ready, DDL, write, selected-row, insert_id, and failed insert state decisions
SAVEQUERIES timing/logging, num_queries increment, and native execution guard behavior
selected-row last_result population, row-presence break policy, assignment slot policy, row-count transitions, empty result clearing, and cached row visibility
mysqli handle/result recognition, affected-row/insert-id metadata reads, and empty-handle reconnect fallback
limited-user permission denial and wpdb last_error behavior
transaction rollback and explicit table lock/unlock behavior

live_boundaries_covered: server charset/collation negotiation and SQL mode setup
real DDL/DML execution for maybe_create_table, maybe_add_column, and dbDelta
DESCRIBE and SHOW INDEX metadata consumed by dbDelta
wpdb get_var/get_row/get_col/get_results result-shape behavior over live rows
wpdb::query DDL/write/read return and mutation-state branch behavior over live rows
wpdb::_do_query SAVEQUERIES timing/logging and num_queries behavior over live rows
wpdb::query selected-row last_result and num_rows behavior over live rows
wpdb::query fetched-row presence, break, last_result assignment-slot, and count-advance decisions through typed Haxe
wpdb::get_var/get_row/get_results row field/value materialization through typed Haxe WpdbRowMaterialization
wpdb::query mysqli errno/error/affected-row/insert-id metadata guard behavior over live rows
wpdb::_do_query mysqli_query execution through typed Haxe WpdbMysqliExecution::query and generated \mysqli_query($handle, $query)
wpdb::query mysqli_fetch_object execution through typed Haxe WpdbMysqliExecution::fetchObject and generated \mysqli_fetch_object($result)
wpdb::query empty native handle reconnect fallback behavior
database-backed option and transient storage in wp_options
limited-user permission denial captured through wpdb::last_error
transaction rollback and LOCK TABLES/UNLOCK TABLES behavior

native_boundaries.reason: The locked php:8.4-cli and php:8.5-cli containers do not include mysqli/pdo_mysql in this toolchain. The live DB gate therefore uses the local PHP CLI mysqli client and records this as the client boundary.

WPHX-305.19 proved that @:phpGlobal typed mysqli externs lower through the stock Haxe PHP target to direct global \mysqli_query($handle, $query) and \mysqli_fetch_object($result) calls. WPHX-305.21 integrates that generated Haxe helper into the live wpdb shell and removes the generated WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary class from this candidate.

WPHX-305.21 routes fetched-row object presence, stdClass field extraction, numeric value extraction, and OBJECT_K first-field key materialization through generated Haxe PHP WpdbRowMaterialization helpers. Those helpers lower PHP-native row operations through typed @:phpGlobal externs instead of php.Syntax.code or generated PHP postprocessing.

upgrade.php requires wp-admin/includes/admin.php at load time, but the live gate exercises dbDelta(), maybe_create_table(), maybe_add_column(), wp_should_upgrade_global_tables(), option.php, and transient storage only.

The fixture provisions disposable local Docker databases with root bootstrap credentials, then creates a limited user for permission-denial coverage. Production credential provisioning and secret handling are outside this parity gate.

closes_gaps_from.resolution: WPHX-305.21 extends the typed Haxe schema-helper/dbDelta candidate with bounded wpdb mysqli row traversal and row materialization policy while retaining live MySQL/MariaDB execution through wpdb.

WPHX-305.21 narrows a bounded wpdb query result traversal and row materialization portion of this gap by routing mysqli_query()/mysqli_fetch_object() plus stdClass field/value extraction through typed Haxe helpers while preserving the WordPress-visible wpdb shell. Full wpdb replacement/drop-in behavior and storage ownership remain split to later WPHX-305 slices.
WPHX-305.21 keeps the dbDelta planning helper in the candidate while extending the wpdb class shell.

WPHX-305.21 keeps the result-shape candidate in the live shell while routing selected-row traversal policy, row field/value materialization, and mysqli query/fetch execution through typed Haxe helpers.
WPHX-305.21 keeps the query-state candidate in the live shell while adding typed Haxe decisions for fetched-row presence, loop break, last_result assignment slot, and row-count advancement.

WPHX-305.21 follows the native-execution candidate by keeping the WordPress-visible _do_query() shell while moving mysqli_query() execution into generated Haxe PHP through WpdbMysqliExecution::query().

WPHX-305.21 follows result-population ownership by keeping fetched-row loop break, last_result assignment-slot, count advancement policy, and stdClass row field/value materialization in typed Haxe around WpdbMysqliExecution::fetchObject().

WPHX-305.21 narrows this gap with typed fetched-row traversal decisions, generated Haxe PHP direct global mysqli_query()/mysqli_fetch_object() calls, and typed Haxe-owned row field/value materialization.
WPHX-305.21 replaces the generated two-method mysqli boundary in the live candidate with WpdbMysqliExecution generated from typed Haxe @:phpGlobal externs.
WPHX-305.21 preserves the WPHX-305.17 row traversal behavior while removing WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary from the candidate shell.
WPHX-305.21 integrates the WPHX-305.19 @:phpGlobal lowering proof into the live wpdb candidate and reruns the MySQL/MariaDB oracle comparison.

WPHX-305.21 moves fetched-row object presence, get_var row value extraction, get_row ARRAY_A/ARRAY_N materialization, get_results ARRAY_A/ARRAY_N materialization, and OBJECT_K first-field key extraction into WpdbRowMaterialization generated from typed Haxe.

remaining_gaps.detail: This candidate keeps the public PHP wpdb method shell for plugin/drop-in ABI compatibility while moving another bounded query/result slice into typed Haxe. A later slice still needs to prove full wpdb replacement/drop-in loading, public mutable state ownership, and broader plugin compatibility.
The official locked PHP CLI images do not include mysqli/pdo_mysql. A future custom PHP DB-client image can add PHP-version matrix coverage for this live database gate.
upgrade.php is loaded with a stubbed admin include because this harness covers database helpers and storage paths, not the broader install/admin API.
This fixture covers WPHX-305.06 seed traces plus live runtime checks. Full upstream wpdb, dbDelta, option, and transient PHPUnit parity remains a domain-level closure requirement.
